name: SetMapObjectBmpFilePath
title: SetMapObjectBmpFilePath
syntax: long SetMapObjectBmpFilePath( long handle, char filePath[] );
description: Sets the file path to a bitmap for a map object of the type bitmap.
For transparency pure white color (RGB 255, 255, 255) is used.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Path of the bitmap file. You can set an absolute path (e.g. "C:\myCANoeConfig\bmp\circles.bmp") or a relative path (e.g. "bmp\circles.bmp"). If the relative option is used, the path is seen relative to the location of the CANoe configuration. If the bitmap file could not be found or load, the bitmap is displayed in the Map Window.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
